results.rendered_html: tiṣṭhad—gu ind. ( Pāṇ. ii, 1, 17 ), ‘when the cows (go) stand to be milked’, after sunset,  Bhaṭṭ. iv, 14.

results.rendered_html: tiṣṭhadgu (tiṣṭhant, partic. praes. von sthā, + gu = go) adv. zur Zeit wann die Kühe stehen um gemolken zu werden, nach Sonnenuntergang  P. 2,1,17 . ātiṣṭhadgu japansaṃndhyāṃ prakrāntāmāyatīgavam  BHAṬṬ. 4,14 . Schol.: gāvo hi rātriprathamayāmasya nāḍīkāyāmatītāyāṃ viśrāntāḥ satya utthāpya duhyante.

results.rendered_html: tiṣṭhadgu ind. At the time when cows stand to be milked (i. e. after an hour or an hour and a half after evening); ātiṣṭhadgu japan saṃdhyāṃ  Bk. 4. 14  (tiṣṭhadgu = rātraiḥ prathamanāḍikā).
